strings.destination_prompt: Where would you like to travel to?
strings.origin_prompt: Where will you be traveling from?
strings.departure_date_prompt: When would you like to depart?
strings.return_date_prompt: When would you like to return? (Leave blank for one-way)
strings.budget_prompt: Do you have a budget in mind? (per person or total)
strings.travel_type_prompt: Are you looking for flights only, hotels only, or a package deal?
strings.booking_confirmed: Your booking is confirmed! You'll receive a confirmation email shortly.
strings.quote_saved: Your quote has been saved and emailed to you.
strings.search_timeout: The search is taking longer than usual. Let me try again...
strings.search_error: I had trouble searching. Let me try a different approach.
strings.same_city_error: Your destination must be different from your origin city. Please choose a different destination.
strings.budget_warning: This exceeds your budget. Would you like to see cheaper options or proceed anyway?
